description:
You are a dispatch clerk at the San Andreas Emergency Services. A civilian named Diego Ramirez has arrived to report his vehicle stolen at gunpoint on Vinewood Boulevard. Witnesses identified the suspects as Trevor Philips and Franklin Clinton. Using the OpenCAD system at http://localhost (credentials: admin@opencad.local / Admin123!), process the full intake and coordinate the pursuit response.

Register Diego Ramirez as a new civilian identity (First Name: Diego, Last Name: Ramirez, DOB: 1993-08-22, Address: 4710 Palomino Avenue, Los Santos, San Andreas, 90045, Gender: Male, Race: Hispanic, Driver License Status: Valid). Register his stolen vehicle linked to his identity (Plate: DGR-2247, Brand: Pegassi, Model: Zentorno, Color: Yellow, Year: 2023, Registration: Valid, Insurance: Current).

Create a 10-64 (Crime in Progress) dispatch call at Vinewood Boulevard with narrative: 'Armed carjacking reported. Stolen yellow Pegassi Zentorno plate DGR-2247. Suspects fled eastbound.' Issue a vehicle BOLO for the stolen Pegassi Zentorno (Yellow, plate DGR-2247, last seen Vinewood Boulevard, reason: 'Stolen vehicle - armed carjacking'). Issue a $750 citation to Trevor Philips for 'Reckless Driving'. Create a person BOLO for Franklin Clinton (Black male, 25, last seen Vinewood Boulevard, wanted for questioning in armed carjacking).
